records.question: Which purchases of exactly 1522 shares with an amount of 822.803 were made on or before 1990-12-02 09:03:38 by investors whose details are l and have sales details of p?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN ref_transaction_types ON transactions.transaction_type_code = ref_transaction_types.transaction_type_code
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN sales ON transactions.transaction_id = sales.sales_transaction_id
WHERE investors.investor_details = 'l' AND transactions.share_count = '1522' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction = 822.803 AND ref_transaction_types.transaction_type_description = 'Purchase' AND transactions.date_of_transaction <= '1990-12-02 09:03:38' AND sales.sales_details = 'p'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.transaction_id FROM Transactions AS T1 INNER JOIN Purchases AS T2 ON T1.transaction_id = T2.purchase_transaction_id INNER JOIN Investors AS T3 ON T1.investor_id = T3.investor_id WHERE T1.share_count = '1522' AND T1.amount_of_transaction = 822.803 AND T1.date_of_transaction <= '1990-12-02 09:03:38' AND T3.Investor_details = 'l' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Sales AS T4 INNER JOIN Transactions AS T5 ON T4.sales_transaction_id = T5.transaction_id WHERE T5.investor_id = T1.investor_id AND T4.sales_details = 'p' )

records.question: Which transactions involve exactly 930 shares and have a transaction amount of at least 0.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN ref_transaction_types ON transactions.transaction_type_code = ref_transaction_types.transaction_type_code
JOIN sales ON transactions.transaction_id = sales.sales_transaction_id
WHERE transactions.share_count = '930' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction >= 0.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT transaction_id FROM Transactions WHERE share_count = '930' AND amount_of_transaction >= 0.0

records.question: What transactions occurred on 1988-09-16 19:02:51 with exactly 8718572 shares?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN lots ON investors.investor_id = lots.investor_id
WHERE transactions.date_of_transaction = '1988-09-16 19:02:51' AND transactions.share_count = '8718572'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.transaction_id FROM Transactions AS T1 WHERE T1.date_of_transaction = '1988-09-16 19:02:51' AND T1.share_count = '8718572'

records.question: What transactions since 2002-04-07 20:28:37 have sales_details exactly p, investor_details exactly d, and a transaction amount at most 183.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN sales ON transactions.transaction_id = sales.sales_transaction_id
WHERE transactions.date_of_transaction >= '2002-04-07 20:28:37' AND sales.sales_details = 'p' AND investors.investor_details = 'd' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction <= 183.2
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.transaction_id FROM Transactions AS T1 INNER JOIN Sales AS T2 ON T1.transaction_id = T2.sales_transaction_id INNER JOIN Investors AS T3 ON T1.investor_id = T3.investor_id WHERE T1.date_of_transaction > '2002-04-07 20:28:37' AND T2.sales_details = 'p' AND T3.Investor_details = 'd' AND T1.amount_of_transaction <= 183.2

records.question: Which transactions on 1988-09-16 19:02:51 have a share count of 8718572, an amount of transaction at most 302507.6996, and involve investors with details k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
WHERE investors.investor_details = 'k' AND transactions.date_of_transaction = '1988-09-16 19:02:51' AND transactions.share_count = '8718572' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction <= 302507.6996

records.question: What transactions occurred on or before 1988-09-16 19:02:51 with exactly 8718572 shares and an amount of at least 302507.6996, where the investor details are exactly k and the lot details are d?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT transactions.transaction_id FROM transactions
JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN lots ON investors.investor_id = lots.investor_id
WHERE lots.lot_details = 'd' AND investors.investor_details = 'k' AND transactions.date_of_transaction <= '1988-09-16 19:02:51' AND transactions.share_count = '8718572' AND transactions.amount_of_transaction >= 302507.6996
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.transaction_id FROM Transactions AS T1 INNER JOIN Investors AS T2 ON T1.investor_id = T2.investor_id INNER JOIN Transactions_Lots AS T3 ON T1.transaction_id = T3.transaction_id INNER JOIN Lots AS T4 ON T3.lot_id = T4.lot_id WHERE T1.date_of_transaction <= '1988-09-16 19:02:51' AND T1.share_count = '8718572' AND T1.amount_of_transaction >= 302507.6996 AND T2.Investor_details = 'k' AND T4.lot_details = 'd'

JOIN investors ON transactions.investor_id = investors.investor_id
JOIN sales ON transactions.transaction_id = sales.sales_transaction_id
